mapper.sql: u.id, u.username, u.password, u.role, u.nickname, u.gender, u.college, u.major, u.phone, u.wechat, u.qq, u.email, u.create_time, COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(AVG(e.score), 1) FROM evaluate e WHERE e.to_user_id = u.id), 0) AS avg_rating
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, role, nickname, create_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, 0, #{nickname}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user u WHERE u.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM user u WHERE u.username = #{username}
SELECT FROM user u WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.password = #{password}
SELECT FROM user u ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET role = #{role} WHERE id = #{id}
